summary: Complete power analysis for mRNA-4157 Phase 2 interim analysis
description: Run power analysis for the planned interim analysis of mRNA-4157 Phase 2, including operating characteristics under H0 and H1 assumptions.

summary: Review SAP amendments for RSV post-market surveillance study
description: Review and incorporate protocol amendments into the Statistical Analysis Plan for the RSV post-market surveillance study.

summary: Update adaptive enrichment design methods section for NEJM paper
description: Update the adaptive enrichment design methods section of the NEJM manuscript draft, ensuring alignment with the final analysis plan.

summary: Generate quarterly safety signal detection report
description: Generate the Q2 2026 safety signal detection report using the current BCPNN pipeline; include disproportionality analysis tables.

summary: Finalize PH 206 fall 2026 final exam questions
description: Draft and finalize the PH 206 fall 2026 final exam questions covering survival analysis, logistic regression, and hypothesis testing modules.

summary: Code review: R scripts for primary endpoint analysis
description: Perform code review on the R scripts used for primary endpoint analysis in mRNA-4157, checking for correctness, reproducibility, and compliance with the SAP.

summary: Validate randomization dataset against IWRS log for mRNA-4157
description: Validate and clean the mRNA-4157 Phase 2 randomization dataset; flag discrepancies against the IWRS log.

summary: Prepare DSMB package for mRNA-4157 Q3 2026 review
description: Prepare the DSMB package for the mRNA-4157 Phase 2 Q3 2026 review, including blinded efficacy summaries and safety tables.

summary: Draft biostatistics section of IND annual report for mRNA-4157
description: Draft the biostatistics section of the IND annual report for the mRNA-4157 program, summarizing interim results and ongoing analyses.

summary: Update SOP for missing data handling per ICH E9(R1) estimand framework
description: Update the Windbridge Partners internal SOP for handling missing data in oncology trials, incorporating ICH E9(R1) estimand framework guidance.
